title: Bending Spoons ($BSP): IPO Due Diligence Memo
question: Is Bending Spoons a differentiated permanent owner/operator of digital products, or a PE-like software roll-up whose growth depends on M&A, debt, restructuring and pricing power?
finding: Real business, real complexity. Revenue grew from $387.1m in 2023 to $1.306bn in 2025 and $601.3m in Q1 2026, but the model is acquisition-heavy, debt-backed and founder-controlled. The core question is whether Luca Ferrari's operating system can keep converting mature apps into cash flow without burning product trust, support quality, users or the balance sheet.
